problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
